personal.name: Shreesh Kulkarni
personal.title: Software Engineer | AI & Full-Stack
personal.subtitle: MSCS @ Northeastern University | 4.0 GPA
personal.bio: Currently pursuing a Master's in Computer Science at Northeastern University. Recently worked as a Software Engineer at Lowe's India. Prior experience includes full-stack development at Exinous Technologies. Recipient of the Richard E. Merwin Student Scholarship.
personal.metaDescription: Shreesh Kulkarni — Software Engineer & AI builder. MSCS at Northeastern (4.0 GPA). LangChain, RAG, React, FastAPI. Open to full-time roles.

highlights: Architected an inbound trailer optimization algorithm to streamline logistics for Regional Distribution Centers, reducing demurrage and detention costs by thousands of dollars each day.
Automated end-to-end manual planning workflows via a centralized orchestration platform, reducing manual coordination required by staff by 20% to manage high-volume trailer arrivals.
Promoted from Associate Software Engineer to Software Engineer; recognized with Spot and Individual Excellence Awards for delivering high-quality, scalable solutions.
Bootstrapped the core patient data collection application using Vue.js and Python Flask, scaling from 10 to thousands of patients.
Migrated infrastructure to the cloud using AWS, cutting infrastructure costs by 70% and improving reliability.
Trained and mentored a cohort of interns, guiding them through technical workshops and project-based assessments.

projects.name: AI Coding Tutor Agent
projects.description: Full-stack AI tutoring platform with a multi-agent LangChain architecture — dedicated agents for Socratic hint generation, sandboxed code execution via Judge0, and adaptive difficulty scoring. Features a RAG pipeline with embeddings for personalized tutoring based on user history.

projects.name: pg-schema-explorer-mcp
projects.description: Model Context Protocol server exposing any PostgreSQL database as a conversational interface for Claude Desktop. Implements an NL-to-SQL pipeline with dual-model Anthropic API strategy, multi-layered read-only safety architecture, BFS-based foreign-key relationship traversal, and an index optimization advisor.

projects.name: cf_ai_dbagent
projects.tech: Cloudflare Workers + React 19 + MCP + Workers AI + PostgreSQL
projects.description: Production-ready, edge-deployed AI assistant for PostgreSQL — submitted to the Cloudflare 1111 Intern Program. Chat with your database in plain English via a React 19 WebSocket UI. Two cooperating Cloudflare Workers communicate over the Model Context Protocol: a chat agent running Llama 3.3 70B handles NL-to-SQL and schema exploration via tool-calling chains, while an MCP server executes queries through Cloudflare Hyperdrive. Features Vectorize-powered semantic schema search, Durable Object SQLite for session memory, and a human-in-the-loop approval gate for all write operations.

projects.name: Shizen — AI Financial Assistant
projects.description: Multi-agent AI financial assistant with a RAG-powered backend using LangChain and Pinecone vector search. Features interactive dual-axis financial visualizations with D3.js and Recharts, and a FastAPI backend connected to live financial data APIs.

projects.name: CNN-Based Sudoku Solver
projects.description: Convolutional neural network trained on synthetically generated Sudoku puzzle datasets to predict solutions from incomplete grids. Built end-to-end ML pipeline applying deep learning concepts from MIT 6.S191.

projects.name: SportsTV Germany Data Warehouse
projects.tech: MySQL + R + ETL + Kimball Star Schema
projects.description: End-to-end data warehouse for a German sports streaming platform — Kimball star schema in MySQL, ETL pipeline in R processing ~1M streaming transactions, and BI reports in R Markdown for viewer engagement and subscription insights.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Pacman
projects.description: Implemented minimax, alpha-beta pruning, and expectimax for multi-agent decision-making. Reduced search space by 60% via alpha-beta pruning while maintaining optimal move selection in adversarial game trees.

projects.name: Golang iLO REST SDK
projects.description: RESTful SDK in Golang to interface with HPE Integrated Lights Out (iLO) devices via the Redfish protocol. Implemented modules for power cycling, remote console access, and firmware updates with comprehensive API documentation.

certifications.name: The AI Engineer Path
certifications.description: Comprehensive curriculum covering AI-powered application development, prompt engineering, LLM integration, and building production-ready AI tools.

certifications.name: MIT 6.S191: Introduction to Deep Learning
certifications.description: Intensive coursework covering Computer Vision and NLP fundamentals taught by Alexander Amini.
